overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black muscle car driving through Night City's industrial districts and neon-lit streets at night. The vehicle transitions from covered tunnels through industrial underpasses to open urban highways, with futuristic skyscrapers becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial tunnel with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the covered tunnel, maintaining center lane position

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and industrial lighting
tall gray concrete retaining walls lining both sides of the tunnel
large painted American flag mural on the right wall
large metal ventilation pipes running along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered industrial tunnel with concrete walls and a painted American flag mural. The car drives forward through the dimly lit corridor with industrial pipes visible overhead, maintaining a steady speed through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with overhead pipes and bridges

events.description: exits covered tunnel into open industrial area with visible sky
approaches intersection with other vehicles visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial underpass and approaching an intersection with moderate speed

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same direction through the intersection

entered.detail: large metal bridge structure spanning across the road ahead
network of industrial pipes and conduits crossing above the roadway
warehouses and factory structures with illuminated windows
faint glowing advertisements beginning to appear on the right side

changed.to: left_near only, right side opens to industrial area

segments.scene_description: The car exits the covered tunnel into a semi-open industrial zone with overhead pipes and bridge structures. The environment transitions from enclosed to exposed as the vehicle approaches an intersection, encountering another sedan ahead and beginning to see neon signage in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with warning signs and billboards

events.description: environment becomes dominated by bright neon and holographic lighting
slight speed reduction while navigating past pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: cruising along the neon-lit street, passing pedestrians and maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk near the warning signs

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements with bright colors and corporate logos
repeating WARNING text signs with red lettering on the right wall
floating holographic displays projecting product advertisements
green and yellow LED warning strips along the base of the wall

changed.to: right_near, becoming more prominent and detailed

segments.scene_description: Driving through a vibrant neon-lit district, the car passes bright holographic billboards and warning signs lining the right side of the street. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks near the illuminated walls, and the atmosphere shifts to a dense cyberpunk commercial zone with heavy artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection transitioning to wide urban avenue

events.description: executes left turn at intersection onto wider avenue
road widens significantly and downtown skyscrapers become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and accelerating onto the wide avenue toward downtown

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead on the wide avenue toward the city center

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows visible on the horizon
broad multi-lane road with clear markings leading toward downtown
curved on-ramp structure leading to an overhead highway

segments.scene_description: The car executes a left turn at a major intersection, leaving the neon district behind. The road opens into a wide avenue with distant skyscrapers now visible on the horizon, and an elevated highway ramp appears on the left as the vehicle accelerates toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown highway with corporate towers and holographic advertising

events.description: enters downtown district with dense cluster of skyscrapers surrounding the road

agents.ego_description: speeding down the wide avenue toward the illuminated downtown skyscrapers

entered.detail: dense grouping of tall glass and steel buildings with extensive lighting
multi-level highway structure running parallel to the avenue
large illuminated company names and brands on building facades

changed.to: center_far, appearing larger and more detailed as the car approaches

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car driving at speed down a wide downtown avenue, with massive illuminated skyscrapers towering ahead and an elevated highway running parallel on the left. The environment is dominated by corporate advertising and dense urban architecture as the vehicle approaches the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a black muscle car travels from a claustrophobic industrial tunnel into the sprawling, neon-lit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a dimly lit concrete corridor featuring an American flag mural and overhead pipes, moving steadily forward until the enclosure gives way to a semi-open industrial zone. As the vehicle approaches a busy intersection, the gray concrete shifts into a vibrant commercial district saturated with holographic billboards, warning signs, and pedestrians under heavy artificial lighting. The scene then opens up as the car executes a left turn, leaving the dense neon signage behind for a wide avenue where distant skyscrapers first appear on the horizon. Finally, the camera accelerates down a massive downtown thoroughfare, flanked by an elevated highway and towering corporate architecture that dominates the skyline.
